name: Ham and Sour Cream Baked Noodles
recipeInstructions:
1. Put the cooked pasta into a bowl and toss with the cottage cheese, sour cream, chopped ham, egg substitute, salt, bell pepper, celery, and onion.
2. Add salt and pepper to taste and margarine.
3. Spoon the mixture into a 3-quart casserole sprayed with cooking spray.
4. Bake for 50 to 60 minutes or until bubbly and set.
